inputs.label: Panel Area
inputs.businessContext: Area of a single solar panel in square meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Area of a single solar panel in square meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir güneş panelinin metrekare cinsinden alanı.

inputs.label: Panel Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Conversion efficiency of the solar panel under standard test conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion efficiency of the solar panel under standard test conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart test koşullarında güneş panelinin dönüşüm verimliliği.

inputs.label: Solar Irradiance
inputs.businessContext: Standard test condition irradiance, typically 1000 W/m².

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard test condition irradiance, typically 1000 W/m².
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart test koşulu ışınımı, tipik olarak 1000 W/m².

inputs.label: System Losses
inputs.businessContext: Total system losses including wiring, inverter, soiling, and mismatch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total system losses including wiring, inverter, soiling, and mismatch.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kablolama, invertör, kirlenme ve uyumsuzluk dahil toplam sistem kayıpları.

inputs.label: Tilt Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of the panel relative to horizontal plane.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of the panel relative to horizontal plane.

inputs.label: Azimuth Angle
inputs.businessContext: Compass direction the panel faces (0 = south in northern hemisphere).

businessContext_i18n.en: Compass direction the panel faces (0 = south in northern hemisphere).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Panelin baktığı pusula yönü (kuzey yarımkürede 0 = güney).

inputs.label: Latitude
inputs.businessContext: Latitude of the installation site, positive for northern hemisphere.

businessContext_i18n.en: Latitude of the installation site, positive for northern hemisphere.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurulum sahasının enlemi, kuzey yarımküre için pozitif.

inputs.label: Annual Sun Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total equivalent full-sun hours per year at the location.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total equivalent full-sun hours per year at the location.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konumda yıllık toplam eşdeğer tam güneş saati.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
